description.value: Aura faint evocation; CL 3rd; Slot none; Price 3,395 gp; Weight 4 lbs. DESCRIPTION The blade of this +1 cutlass is spotted with rust, and its basket hilt is cast in the likeness of a grinning skull. Once per day, a tidewater cutlass can be used to cast hydraulic push. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells hydraulic push; Cost 1,855 gp
